decks.notes: This deck focuses on assembling the Greasefang Parhelion combo by utilizing cards like Monument to Endurance and Parhelion II. The goal is to control the board with cards like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize while utilizing Greasefang, Okiba Boss to generate value. The deck also includes cards like Bitter Triumph and Bleachbone Verge for additional removal and disruption. The key strategy is to protect the combo pieces and outvalue the opponent before assembling the combo to win the game.

The deck focuses on aggressive plays with a mixture of cheap spells and creatures to quickly deal damage to the opponent. By utilizing cards like Monastery Swiftspear, Soul-Scar Mage, and Emberheart Challenger, the deck aims to control the board early on and maintain pressure throughout the game. Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage provide removal options while Stormchaser's Talent and Heroes' Hangout help to pump up creatures for bigger threats. The deck also includes a few bounce spells like Boomerang Basics to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain tempo.

The deck focuses on fast and aggressive plays, utilizing cards like Sentinel of the Nameless City and Ouroboroid to quickly put pressure on the opponent. It also includes disruption elements like Duress and Thoughseize to control the opponent's hand and removal spells like Fatal Push and Go for the Throat to deal with threats. The deck aims to outpace opponents with efficient creatures and removal spells, while also having some resilience with cards like Unholy Annex / Ritual Chamber and Boseiju, Who Endures.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, while utilizing cards like Academic Dispute and Experimental Synthesizer to maintain card advantage. The deck aims to control the board early with cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, then finish off the opponent with burst damage from spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage. By combining efficient creatures with burn spells and card draw, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in Pioneer 1 vs 1 matches.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and disruptive spells, while utilizing Yorion as a companion for additional value. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early with cards like Voice of Resurgence and Llanowar Elves, while also having access to powerful cards like Collected Company and Skyclave Apparition for card advantage and removal. The inclusion of cards like Tyvar, the Pummeler and Werefox Bodyguard provide additional combat tricks and ways to push through damage. The deck also includes cards like Melira, the Living Cure and Guardian of Faith for protection and resilience against opposing strategies.

The deck focuses on utilizing low-cost creatures with disruptive abilities to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By consistently putting pressure on the opponent and controlling the board with creatures like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Archon of Emeria, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and win through aggressive attacks. The inclusion of cards like Collected Company and Elspeth, Storm's Slayer allow for additional card advantage and powerful finishers to secure victory. Overall, the deck aims to be fast, efficient, and disruptive in order to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent.

The deck focuses on aggressively deploying creatures early on to overwhelm the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Archon of Emeria and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben. Collected Company provides the deck with additional creature presence and Boseiju, Who Endures allows for uncounterable spells. Skyclave Apparition and Michelangelo's Technique offer removal options, while Abandoned Air Temple boosts the power of the deck's creatures. Overall, the deck aims to establish board presence quickly and maintain pressure on the opponent through a combination of efficient creatures and disruption spells.

Control The Rock deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan by using cards like Duress, Thoughtseize, and Fatal Push to remove threats and gain advantage. The deck also utilizes mana ramp with Llanowar Elves and Mutavault, while generating card advantage with cards like Blooming Marsh and Overgrown Tomb. The win condition is to establish a board presence with Sentinel of the Nameless City and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse, while maintaining control with cards like Abrupt Decay and Go for the Throat. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent and secure victory through a combination of disruption and power plays.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying creatures with the goal of overwhelming the opponent with a fast and aggressive game plan. With cards like Bishop of Wings and Resplendent Angel, the deck aims to generate value and gain life to stay ahead of the opponent. Collected Company allows for explosive creature deployment while cards like Righteous Valkyrie and Skyclave Apparition provide additional threats and disruption. By efficiently utilizing its mana base and creature selection, this deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain board control throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly getting Arclight Phoenix into the graveyard and then utilizing spells such as Fiery Impulse and Lightning Axe to bring them back onto the battlefield for repetitive damage. The deck also includes card draw and filtering spells like Consider and Sleight of Hand to help find the needed pieces. Ledger Shredder and Picklock Prankster provide additional support for the graveyard strategy. Treasure Cruise helps refill the hand while also enabling more Phoenix activations. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with consistent aggression and efficient spellcasting.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Duress while controlling the board with removal like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay. It also utilizes mana acceleration with Llanowar Elves and Mutavault to ramp into powerful threats like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent with card advantage and resilient threats, ultimately grinding out a win through attrition. The inclusion of cards like Sentinel of the Nameless City and Unholy Annex/Ritual Chamber provide additional utility and value in a prolonged game.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on building a strong board presence quickly by utilizing mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic to ramp into powerful creatures such as Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Skyclave Apparition. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Archon of Emeria and Aven Interrupter to slow down opponents, while cards like Collected Company and Elspeth, Storm Slayer provide additional value and reach. With a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive elements, this deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain tempo throughout the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing a variety of powerful legendary creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By maximizing the use of legendary creatures and support cards like Mox Amber and Plaza of Heroes, the deck aims to consistently apply pressure to the opponent while also benefitting from synergies within the deck. With a mix of combat tricks, card draw, and mana acceleration, the deck aims to maintain a fast pace and dominate the board in order to secure victory.

This Jund Aggro deck focuses on sacrificing creatures for value and dealing damage to the opponent through various sacrifice outlets like Witch's Oven and Bloodtithe Harvester. It also includes cards like Mayhem Devil and Yagra, Eater of All to further punish the opponent for creature sacrifices. The deck aims to establish board control early on and maintain pressure by sacrificing creatures and dealing incremental damage until the opponent is overwhelmed. The inclusion of removal spells like Fatal Push helps to clear the way for aggressive attacks.

This deck focuses on quickly assembling Lotus Field to generate a large amount of mana, allowing the player to cast powerful spells like Scapeshift and Lumra, Bellow of the Woods. The deck also utilizes cards like Arboreal Grazer and Aftermath Analyst to ramp up mana quickly and protect the combo pieces. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a large amount of mana and powerful spells, ending the game in a single explosive turn.

The deck focuses on assembling the Lotus Field combo using cards like Arboreal Grazer, Thespian's Stage, and Hidden Strings to generate a large amount of mana quickly. It also includes cards like Emergent Ultimatum and Fae of Wishes to search for key pieces of the combo or powerful spells like Omniscience. The deck aims to ramp up quickly, find the necessary pieces to go off, and win the game in a single explosive turn using cards like Peer into the Abyss or Into the Flood Maw.
